name: substances-and-paraphernalia
description: Tooling for the Substances and Paraphernalia FoundryVTT module.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:content
scripts.test:unit: node --test test/unit/abstain.test.mjs test/unit/admin-match.test.mjs test/unit/integration-enabled.test.mjs test/unit/modifier-flag-shape.test.mjs test/unit/modifier-pipeline.test.mjs test/unit/modifier-resolution-reroll.test.mjs test/unit/overdose-flag-shape.test.mjs test/unit/overdose.test.mjs test/unit/paraphernalia-subtypes.test.mjs test/unit/tmfx-presets.test.mjs test/unit/tolerance-pipeline.test.mjs test/unit/tolerance.test.mjs test/unit/validate-content.test.mjs test/unit/vignette-color.test.mjs test/unit/withdrawal-formula.test.mjs
